channel.title: Settlement Watch - Antitrust
channel.description: Legal settlements from courts and regulators - Antitrust

item.title: [$4.9B] Attorney General Bonta Opposes Trump Administration’s Proposed Slashing of Healthcare AI Transparency and Bias Protections
item.description: Search Press Releases: Search by keywords or phrases -Year 1999 2000 2001 2002 2003 2004 2005 2006 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 2012 2013 2014 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 2020 2021 2022 2023 2024 2025 2026 Year -Month Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec Month -Year 1999 2000 2001 2002 2003 2004

item.title: Enforcement
item.description: Enforcement We enforce federal competition and consumer protection laws that prevent anticompetitive, deceptive, and unfair business practices. View Enforcement

item.title: Take action
item.description: Take action Submit Merger/Antitrust Comment File adjudicative documents Find banned debt collectors View competition guidance

item.title: How Loyalty Discounts Between Firms Harm Competition When There Are Network Effects: FTC v. Surescripts
item.description: Competition Matters How Loyalty Discounts Between Firms Harm Competition When There Are Network Effects: FTC v. Surescripts Matthew Chesnes (DAD, BE Antitrust I) and Ted Rosenbaum (Acting BE Director) February 13, 2026

item.title: Domestic Flight Antitrust Class Action Settlement
item.description: Domestic Flight Antitrust Class Action Settlement Settlement Payout Varies Deadline Varies Proof Required? N/A This settlement covers those who bought domestic airline tickets from Delta, Southwest, United, Continental, or US Airways between July 1, 2011 and December 2017 and between July 1, 2011 an

item.title: Residential Real Estate Broker Commissions Antitrust Settlements
item.description: Residential Real Estate Broker Commissions Antitrust Settlements The lawsuits allege that companies like Compass, Redfin, and others enforced rules that made home sellers pay inflated commissions to the buyer's agent, which they claim is unfair and violates antitrust laws. These lawsuits argue that

item.title: [$141.8M] RealPage Rental Software Antitrust Tenants' Rent Price-Fixing $141.8M Class Action Settlement
[$87.5M] $87.5M Consumer Beef Price Fixing Class Action Settlement
[$199.5M] Visa Mastercard Merchant Settlement
item.description: Visa and Mastercard settle merchant class action over interchange fees. Claims being processed.

item.title: [$700M] Google Play Store Antitrust Settlement
item.description: Google settles Play Store antitrust claims. Class members may qualify for payments.
